jd_text: On-site | UAE | Crypto/Fintech | Senior Leadership | UAE Residence is a must About the Opportunity We are a recruitment partner supporting a fintech company in the final stages of launching a regulated cryptocurrency exchange in the UAE (SCA licence). The company is building a fully compliant and scalable crypto platform designed to serve both retail and institutional clients under the UAE regulatory framework. As part of the licensing process, they are assembling a core leadership team and are looking for a Chief Financial Officer / Finance Manager - a key role responsible for building the financial function, ensuring regulatory compliance, and supporting long-term business growth. Why This Role Is Unique Build the finance function from scratch in a regulated crypto exchange. Work directly with the UAE regulator (SCA) as part of the licensing process. Join at an early stage with strong growth ambitions and market potential. High level of ownership across financial strategy and operations. Direct impact on business scaling, investor relations, and compliance. What You Will Be Doing Financial Strategy & Leadership Define and execute the company’s financial strategy in line with UAE regulations. Lead budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning across fiat and crypto operations. Support strategic decision-making, partnerships, and investor relations. Build and lead the finance team, establishing a culture of accountability and transparency. Financial Operations & Reporting Build scalable financial infrastructure and processes from the ground up. Oversee accounting operations across fiat and digital assets. Ensure accurate and timely financial reporting in line with IFRS and UAE requirements. Maintain reconciliation between on-chain and off-chain transactions. Establish internal controls, reporting standards, and financial governance. Regulatory & Compliance Oversight Act as the main financial point of contact with the SCA and other regulators. Ensure compliance with licensing requirements and financial regulations. Support audits, regulatory reviews, and reporting obligations. Work closely with Compliance on AML/CFT and financial controls. Risk & Capital Management Develop frameworks for capital management, reserves, and financial stability. Monitor exposure to market, liquidity, and operational risks. Ensure proper segregation of client and company funds. Address risks related to crypto assets, including volatility and custody. What We Are Looking For 10+ years of experience in finance (banking, fintech , or crypto ). At least 3 years in a regulated financial institution or licensed environment. Strong understanding of UAE financial regulations and SCA requirements. Professional certification: CPA , ACCA , CFA (or equivalent). Deep knowledge of IFRS, financial reporting, and compliance frameworks. Solid understanding of crypto markets, blockchain, and digital asset accounting. Proven leadership experience and ability to build teams from scratch. Strong communication and stakeholder management skills. Fluent English (Arabic is a plus). Nice to Have Experience working directly with SCA. Background in crypto exchanges or digital asset platforms. Experience with treasury and custody solutions (e.g., Fireblocks, Copper). Involvement in licensing or regulatory approval processes. Location & Conditions 📍 Abu Dhabi, UAE - on-site role. 🏠 UAE residency required (or willingness to relocate). 💰 Competitive compensation, discussed individually. Why Join Us Opportunity to build and lead the finance function from day one. Direct exposure to regulators and executive leadership. Join a high-growth crypto business entering a regulated market. Work in a fast-moving environment with real ownership and impact. Please note: this role is subject to regulatory approval. Certain restrictions may apply based on regulatory requirements.
